title: hieracium murorum subsp. parialtum
intro: Hieracium murorum subsp. parialtum, a lesser-known variety of Hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the dandelion family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, as it contains bitter compounds that stimulate digestion and relieve indigestion. The health benefits of Hieracium murorum subsp. parialtum include its anti-inflammatory properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other joint-related conditions. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
